THUNDERSTORM WINDS KNOCKED DOWN LARGE TREES AND TREE LIMBS, NEW AND METAL POST FENCES, AND THE SHINGLES OFF ROOFS IN A SMALL AREA IN SACHSE. A METAL GARAGE DOOR WAS CAVED IN AND PART OF A WOOD FENCE WAS IMPALED INTO THE SIDING OF A HOUSE. THE DAMAGE OCCURRED EAST OF THE HIGH SCHOOL IN AN AREA CONFINED BY HUNTER'S RIDGE, MAPLE SHADE, HAVERHILL, AND MILES ROAD. APPROXIMATELY 10-15 HOMES WERE DAMAGED.

DELAYED REPORT OF A PORTABLE OUTBUILDING DISPLACED AROUND 30 FT WITH NUMEROUS TREES UPROOTED (SOME LARAGE) IN THE DIVINE MERCY NEIGHBORHOOD. A CARPORT NEAR RUTHERFORD ELEMENTARY SCHOOL WAS ALSO DAMAGED IN MESQUITE. TIME ESTIMAVED VIA RADAR.
